name: 24"x22" Solid Woven Outdoor Deep Seat Cushion Mocha - Threshold™
description:
Upgrade your existing patio seating with this 24-Inch x 22-Inch Woven Outdoor Deep Seat Cushion from Threshold™. Complete with knife edging, this square deep seat chair cushion upholstered in woven UV-resistant fabric is designed for lasting outdoor use. The soft fill offers comfortable seating, and the cushion is easy to spot or wipe clean.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
